password.tooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters
password.tooLong: Password must be at most 128 characters

password.noWhitespace: Password cannot start or end with whitespace

tags.max: Tags must be at most 20 items

dueDate.invalid: Due date must be a valid date

publishedAt.invalid: Published at must be a valid datetime

estimatedHours.min: Estimated hours must be zero or greater

progressPercent.integer: Progress must be a whole number

attachmentsUrl.max: Attachments must be at most 10 items

externalLink.invalid: External link must be a valid URL

tooltips.concurrentUsers: Number of users accessing the system at the same time
tooltips.headroom: Reserve factor so the system does not run at full load
tooltips.requestsPerUserPerSecond: Average requests a user sends per second
tooltips.apiCallsPerRequest: One frontend request can call multiple backend APIs
tooltips.dbRatioPerRequest: Share of APIs that actually access the DB
tooltips.searchRatioPerRequest: Share of requests that use search
tooltips.cacheRatioPerRequest: Share of requests that use cache (Redis)
tooltips.kafkaRatioPerRequest: Number of messages/events generated per request
tooltips.logBytesPerRequest: Amount of log data generated per request
tooltips.authRatio: Share of APIs that trigger user authentication
